name: AIResult Lore Entry
description: One structured AIResult lore entry (the World Bible Generator output shape): 13 required keys plus optional names/legacyTitle. Use as eval-run --output-schema to score a model's structured-output conformance (does it emit COMPLETE JSON with every required key?).

example.title: The Echoing Grove
example.summary: A grove where sounds from the past replay for those who listen.
example.canonNotes: Introduced in chapter two; ties to the archive subplot.
risks: May reveal the archive too early.

gameHooks: A perception check reveals the echoes.
